query: TAC Protocol TAC token price trajectory and news July 2026, vesting unlocks, recent trend, technical analysis support resistance
answer: Research complete. Key takeaway: **TAC Protocol's token is in a severe post-crash downtrend.** After hitting an ATH of $0.06715 in early July 2026, it suffered a >90% flash crash on July 7–8, 2026 (from ~$0.06 to ~$0.0046 in 15 minutes), which the team attributed to a large perpetual-futures sell order overwhelming thin liquidity — not a hack or unlock. As of July 14, 2026 it trades around **$0.00277** (~$14M market cap) and is stabilizing fragilely in the $0.0025–$0.0031 range with collapsed volume. Critical support sits at ~$0.0020; resistance ($0.0349/$0.0536) is far overhead. Structural risks — extreme whale concentration (~99.55% top-holder share), thin liquidity, and an ~80% locked/vesting supply overhang — dominate the outlook. Full structured findings with data points and sources have been submitted.

sources.snippet: A cascade of futures liquidations on July 7, 2026 triggered a price collapse of over 90% in 15 minutes, attributed to market mechanics, not a security breach. Total supply 10.25B, ~18% circulating at launch, ~80% locked.

sources.title: TAC Protocol Price Prediction: Can TAC Recover After the Crash?
sources.snippet: Team confirmed a large perpetual futures sell order overwhelmed thin liquidity, cascading into liquidations; denied breach/insider selling. Support $0.0020, resistance $0.0349 and $0.0536, RSI 29.94, top holders 99.55%.
